pattern: A left-to-right greedy assignment where each item claims the first capable slot models one-pass bin-fitting with no backtracking allowed.
hints: Process fruit types in the given order; each one is offered to baskets from left to right, and only the FIRST basket that can hold it matters.
Once a basket accepts a fruit type it is used up for the rest of the run - track which baskets are already taken.
For each fruit, scan baskets left to right and take the first unused one whose capacity is >= the fruit's quantity; if none qualifies, count it as unplaced.

edge_inputs.description: every fruit fits exactly its own basket capacity
no basket is large enough for any fruit
a fruit must skip a too-small basket to reach a later capable one, then the next fruit still fits the earlier basket
a bigger basket earlier is claimed first even though a later smaller one would also work, leaving the next equal fruit unplaced
single fruit, single basket, exact max capacity
single fruit exceeds the only basket
duplicate quantities compete for the same capacities, one is left unplaced

stress.description: max-length arrays with capacities and quantities drawn from a narrow overlapping range to force many near-miss placements
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    fruits = [rng.randint(1, 1000) for _ in range(n)]
    baskets = [rng.randint(1, 1000) for _ in range(n)]
    return [fruits, baskets]
stress.note: n is capped at the constraint max regardless of the requested size
